notes: Single source of truth for Hermes agent model routing. Update this file when models/providers/budgets change. All project CLAUDE.md files point here. See hermes-agent-model-strategy-guide.md for full rationale.

deepseek_v4_pro.notes: Promo pricing (~$0.14/MTok blended) through May 31, 2026. Post-promo: ~$0.55/MTok blended.

zai_coding_plan.notes: ~5x Claude Pro equivalent, ~250+ heavy coding sessions/month

usage_caps.notes: Always cap output and use Instant mode to conserve Moderato allowance

orchestrator.description: Planning, decomposition, routing, and QA gate
orchestrator.notes: 1M context critical for holding full project plan + agent outputs. Use prompt caching aggressively.

principal_engineer.description: System design, architecture reviews, complex trade-off analysis, MCP schema design
principal_engineer.when_to_fallback: 80% of architectural questions that are solid engineering judgment rather than genuinely novel

senior_fullstack_dev.description: Feature implementation, MCP server/client code, API development, database work
senior_fullstack_dev.escalation_trigger: Marathon sessions — entire MCP servers, complex end-to-end features, multi-file refactors

senior_frontend_dev.description: React/Next.js components, Tailwind/CSS, responsive layouts, full page builds
senior_frontend_dev.notes: Gemma for rapid prototyping and layout variations; GLM-5.1 for polish and integration

ux_designer.description: UX audit, user flow design, design system specs, accessibility review
ux_designer.usage_pattern: 2-4 Kimi calls/week for UX review. Gemma handles all exploration.

cloud_engineer.description: AWS CDK/CloudFormation, Supabase, Vercel, CI/CD, cost optimization
cloud_engineer.utility_scope: Dockerfile tweaks, env configs, simple Terraform, nginx, docker-compose

qa_engineer.description: Test generation, code review, test coverage analysis, linting
qa_engineer.escalation_trigger: Security reviews, complex logic verification, race conditions, architectural code review

java_specialist.description: Spring Boot services, migration work, API integration, JPA/Hibernate

plan_tier_mapping._description: When create-plan assigns a 'recommended_model' tier to a task, use this mapping to resolve to a concrete model.

cost_control: Cache DeepSeek system prompts aggressively — cache hits are 1/10th input price
Use GLM-5-Turbo as overflow orchestrator when DeepSeek budget runs thin
Route pattern-matching tasks to Gemma before frontier models
Cap Kimi output at max_tokens=4096, always use Instant mode
Batch exploration on Gemma — generate 3-4 options, escalate only the best
Monitor DeepSeek promo expiry (May 31, 2026) and adjust orchestrator strategy

gemma-4-31b.notes: Single-router fallback for DeepSeek+Gemma if direct APIs have downtime
